scene_input.scene_summary: Prophet Muhammad stands victorious on the battlefield, with the Quraysh retreating.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Prophet Muhammad holds his sword aloft, with a triumphant expression.

schema_output.scene_summary: The triumphant victory of the Prophet Muhammad on the battlefield
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 253
schema_output.moral_lesson: Perseverance and faith lead to triumph over adversity

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle gesture

characters.name: The Quraysh warriors
characters.appearance: various builds, wearing traditional Makkah clothing, some with swords and shields

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad stood strong and unwavering on the battlefield, his faith and conviction guiding him to a triumphant victory.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, open desert battlefield with a few scattered palm trees in the distance. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm glow over the scene, with a few clouds in the sky. In the center of the image, a solitary figure stands tall, seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a triumphant gesture, holding a sword aloft. The figure is surrounded by a group of defeated warriors, some lying on the ground, others retreating in disarray, their faces filled with fear and defeat. Soft warm golden light, dramatic and triumphant mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, sand, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
